hero.headline: Discover the fankaar within.
hero.subtext: Authentic Kathak & Hindustani classical music, for every age — across Jaipur & online.
hero.imageAlt: Kathak dancer mid-spin at a Fankaar recital

intro.heading: A gharana of learning in the heart of Jaipur
intro.text: Fankaar — the word itself means artist. Founded by Kathak exponent Vartika Tiwari, our institute carries the guru-shishya tradition into modern Jaipur: rigorous, joyful training in Kathak and Hindustani classical music for students from six to seventy. Whether your child is taking a first step onto the dance floor or you are returning to a long-held dream, there is a place for you here.
